title: lycopsis milleri
intro: Lycopsis milleri, also known as Miller's Hemp, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestive enzymes and relieve stomach issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as a natural antispasmodic, making it effective in treating conditions such as indigestion and menstrual cramps. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
